resources.string: Iridescent fire freezes the hand while space folds behind it.
BLUE-PINK FIRE FREEZES THE HAND. SPACE FOLDS BEHIND IT.

The parchment crawls. Letters shed their meanings and grow new legs. A cold flame burns upward and downward at once, ruins float in broken orbit, and the hourglass remembers tomorrow before yesterday. Physics was only a timid contract signed by frightened minds. Tear the curtain. Laugh at the code beneath it. Reality is most honest when it is being rewritten.
PARCHMENT CRAWLS. COLD FIRE BURNS BOTH WAYS. RUINS FLOAT. THE HOURGLASS REMEMBERS TOMORROW. REALITY REWRITES ITSELF.
